column9: The Muslim Student Association strives to serve Islam and the Muslims on campus by facilitating appropriate outlets for Muslim students to practice their faith and fulfill their religious obligations. We provide and maintain prayer spaces on campus, promote strong bonds of brotherhood and sisterhood within the community, establish positive relations with external clubs and organizations at Hofstra and neighbouring communities, and facilitate various events and services for Muslim students and the wider Hofstra community.

column9: The President of Islamic Relief OTU is responsible for guiding the club's overall management, fostering a positive and inclusive environment, and ensuring the successful execution of club initiatives and activities. I will supervise all executives, offer help when required, and oversee every event to ensure successful operations. The President also arranges weekly meetings. I will serve as the primary representative and advocate for the club, both internally and externally. I am in charge with managing external relations and acting as the liaison between the IR OTU club and the IRC team (Islamic Relief Canada).
